chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.252 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.3752/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.3753/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of main case ----------------------------------------------------- 17.03.2025 Mr. Imran Ali Shah, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant Shah Meer Memon filed instant criminal miscellaneous application for cancellation of bail of respondent Suresh Kumar who was admitted to interim pre- arrest bail vide order dated 04.02.2025. Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application and seeks earlier disposal of case. Mr. Khadim Hussain Khuharo, Addl: P.G. Sindh, present in Court in some other cases waives notice and recorded his no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications, however, with direction to the trial Court to decide the case expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
